title: The Mission to Alabasta Begins
description: On pages 20–23, the mission to alabasta begins as baroque Works agents reveal that Miss Wednesday is Princess Vivi of Alabasta, turning Whiskey Peak into a deadly chase.
scene: The Mission to Alabasta Begins. Baroque Works agents reveal that Miss Wednesday is Princess Vivi of Alabasta, turning Whiskey Peak into a deadly chase. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Not only can he not escape anymore, but he won't be able to attack either!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: that idiot... you could have woken up at the very least before you became a hostage.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: What is he, an action figure!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I'll be BORRO- wing your stomach!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on the mission to alabasta begins. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
